$comment: Design token file for the OTP Input Mobile component
$description: Full OTP entry field group for mobile screens. Composes a label, a row of OTP Input Field cells (4 or 6 digits), and a hint text row. Supports three sizes (xs, sm, md), two digit counts (4, 6), and five states (default, error, disabled, loading, success). Loading state shows the OTP Loader spinner inline with hint text. Success state shows a check-circle icon inline with green hint text.

gap.description: 4px vertical gap between label, input row, and hint text row

color.description: #344054 — label text color for all sizes and states

xs.description: 13px Medium, 18px line-height — label at xs size

sm.description: 14px Medium, 20px line-height — label at sm size

md.description: 16px Medium, 24px line-height — label at md size

xs.description: 8px gap between digit cells at xs size

sm.description: 8px gap between digit cells at sm size

md.description: 12px gap between digit cells at md size — wider spacing for larger cells

xs.description: 12px Regular, 17px line-height — hint at xs size

sm.description: 13px Regular, 18px line-height — hint at sm size

md.description: 14px Regular, 20px line-height — hint at md size

default.description: #475467 — hint text in default and loading states

gap.description: 4px gap between the OTP Loader spinner and the hint text in loading state

name.description: GHL icon name shown inline with hint text on successful OTP verification

color.description: #039855 — check-circle icon color matches success hint text
